MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michael Lew for Helen Hui (Petitioner).

Mr. Lew stated that all four siblings are U.S. citizens. The Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed is taken under submission.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.
